meta.title: Process Flow Logistics (acquire -> travel -> load -> travel -> unload -> release)
meta.description: A Process Flow task sequence that moves a real acquired transporter through a delivery cycle. A token is created, acquires an AGV from the transport pool, travels to the pickup point (15,0), loads (2.0), travels to the drop-off (15,20), unloads into the real Sink (1.0), then releases the AGV. Delivered cycle time equals the sum of the two travel legs plus load plus unload. Reuses the [pf-travel] parameters. Because travel uses the transport network, adding a capacity-1 edge on the route composes congestion on top of these times (see [pf-travel-congest]).

expected.tolerance: cycle time exact within 1e-6; exactly 1 delivery
expected.run: run the process flow 'logistics' isolated (ModelIO.run_processflow), read kpi.avg_cycle_time
